title: Unified Stones : Nastia's Extension
description: As an addon of the mod "Nastia's Miracle Stones" co-founded by "Alucard" and "TheHunter". The addon adds the feature to unify different miraculouses altogether.
body:
**CREDITS**
-------------------------------
Suits designs : Alucard , TheHunter , im-

Stills/Poses/Posters : JoQa , TheHunter , Alucard

Additional content : TheHunter

General helper : Félix

Testers : Fun

Trial-Testers : Champ

Coders : Alucard, Bogielo 
-------------------------------
**Added unifications for everyone :**
Ladyfly Unifications (Ladybug x Butterfly) : 7 suits

Catmoth Unifications (Cat x Butterfly) : 6 suits

Kingnoir Unifications (Cat x Bee) : 5 suits

Foxbug Unifications (Ladybug x Fox) : 7 suits

Foxnoir Unifications (Cat x Fox) : 6 suits (NEW FOR EVERYONE)

Bugnoire unifications (Ladybug and Cat) : 5 suits (NEW FOR EVERYONE)
-------------------------------
**Utilities of the addon :**

Unification : Using this when already wearing a miraculous allows you to divide whenever you want! This feature is only available if you don't dual methamorphosis.

The keybind being "H" by default can be changed to the mods official transformation keybind without any issues.

Double Methamorphosis : If you're only wearing 2 miraculouses you can already press the keybind and tadaam. (Must be detransformed) but if you are wearing more then 2 you will have to do /pref_nm unification main "-" "-"

The keybind being "H" by default can be change to the mods official transformation keybind without any issues.

Detransformation/Divide : Using this when wearing a unified costume will be useful. But here are some little exceptions. If you have used Double Methamorphosis you will only be able to detransform. However if you've used the Unify feature you will be able to divide from the same miraculous you have unified with.

The keybind being "I" by default can be change to the mods official detransformation keybind without any issues.
-------------------------------
**Commands :**

/gamerule LadybugVisionWhenUnifying = Defaultely set to false which means you will not be able to use it unless you divide or set the gamerule to true.

/gamerule UnificationsMiraculousesStealing = Defaultely set to true, which means you are capable of stealing unified holders miraculouses. (IN THE VISUAL UPDATE ONLY)

/pref_nm unification (allows you to change of suits)

/pref_nm unification main (allows you to choose ur main unification when wearing more then 2 miraculouses)
